TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Ales, title = John_Ales, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Ales} }

S.FORM: John Ales kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 1, John Ales, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
John Ales kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 1, John Ales, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *oħn ales~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *oħn ales~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
